verdicts.description: One verdict per decision point, echoing its key.

key.description: The exact key of the decision point being answered.

action.description: For a text decision: letterbox = keep full width so the side text/graphics stays in frame; crop = follow the speaker (band is just background). For a subject decision: follow = frame the chosen person (see `subject`).

coverage.description: For a letterbox: fraction of source width (0.0-1.0) that must stay visible to keep the text/graphics. 0 otherwise.

subject.description: For a subject decision (action=follow): which visible person is the main subject to frame.

reason.description: Brief justification (what you saw in the thumbnail).
